name: Grid Rod
desc: Equip only to a Cyberse monster you control. It gains 300 ATK, it is unaffected by your opponent's card effects, also the first time it would be destroyed by battle each turn, it is not destroyed. If this face-up card on the field is destroyed and sent to the GY: You can activate this effect; Cyberse monsters you currently control cannot be destroyed by battle or card effects until the end of this turn.
eff: Equip only to a Cyberse monster you control. It gains 300 ATK, it is unaffected by your opponent's card effects, also the first time it would be destroyed by battle each turn, it is not destroyed. If this face-up card on the field is destroyed and sent to the GY: You can activate this effect; Cyberse monsters you currently control cannot be destroyed by battle or card effects until the end of this turn.

action: Activates if destroyed by card effect
mst: Unaffected by the opponent's card effects
Cannot be destroyed by card effects
attack: Equipped cannot be destroyed by battle
misc: Equips only to a specific target
